new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes classifiable under CN subheading 2204 21 23, bearing the protected designation of origin 'Tokaj' as defined in additional note 4(B)(b) to CN Chapter 22, presented in containers not exceeding 2 litres.

Quality borne by a wine of fresh grapes indicating that it originates from and satisfies the protected designation of origin (PDO) conditions for 'Tokaj' as specified in additional note 4(B)(b) to CN Chapter 22.

coverage_explanation: The two main distinguishing criteria captured are: (1) the Tokaj PDO origin quality (modelled as a BFO quality class TokajPDOOriginQuality, referencing additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22), and (2) the small container constraint (≤ 2 L, expressed via the existing eucn:SmallContainer class through BFO parthood). Coverage is partial because the detailed substantive criteria of additional note 4(B)(b) — such as grape varieties, minimum must weight, production area, and specific wine types (Aszú, Szamorodni, etc.) — are defined in the legal note text that is referenced but not reproduced here. Without the full text of note 4(B)(b), the internal PDO conditions cannot be further formalised. The coverage_score is set to 0.75 to reflect that the structural/container and PDO identity criteria are covered, but the internal Tokaj specification criteria remain opaque.
